system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tinhgia_congdoan","body":"
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_TINHGIA_CONGDOAN](@tungay date, @denngay date)
AS
BEGIN

SELECT bophan, tenbophan, ngaythang, SUM(tongtien) AS tongtien
INTO #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN
FROM (
SELECT CASE 
		WHEN bophan = 'B4M' THEN 'PHOI'
		WHEN bophan = 'BRC' THEN 'PHOI'
		WHEN bophan = 'CAO' THEN 'PHOI'
		WHEN bophan = 'DH2D' THEN 'DINHHINH2'
		WHEN BOPHAN = 'DHMC' THEN 'DINHHINH1'
	END AS bophan,
	CASE 
		WHEN bophan = 'B4M' THEN N'Phôi'
		WHEN bophan = 'BRC' THEN N'Phôi'
		WHEN bophan = 'CAO' THEN N'Phôi'
		WHEN bophan = 'DH2D' THEN N'Định hình 2'
		WHEN BOPHAN = 'DHMC' THEN N'Định hình 1'
	END AS tenbophan, tongtien, ngaythang
FROM tr_baocao_hiendien3
WHERE ngaythang BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
	AND bophan IN ('B4M', 'BRC', 'CAO', 'DH2D', 'DHMC')
) A
GROUP BY bophan, tenbophan, ngaythang

SELECT A.makhuvuc, A.tenkhuvuc, 
	B.c_op, B.n_op,
	C.c_location, C.n_location
INTO #CONGDOAN_SANXUAT
FROM tr_khuvuc_sanxuat A
	INNER JOIN trtb_m_op B ON A.makhuvuc = B.department
	INNER JOIN trtb_m_location C ON B.c_op = C.c_op
WHERE B.active = 1 AND C.c_location IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split('DH06-PROD, DH07-PROD, DP09-PROD, DP07-PROD', ','))

SELECT A.ngaythang, A.congdoan, A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu,
	dongia_met, dongia_metvuong, dongia_metkhoi,
	met, metvuong, metkhoi,
	thanhtien_met, thanhtien_metvuong, thanhtien_metkhoi,
	dept_thanhtien_met = SUM(thanhtien_met) OVER(PARTITION BY congdoan),
	dept_thanhtien_metvuong = SUM(thanhtien_metvuong) OVER(PARTITION BY congdoan),
	dept_thanhtien_metkhoi = SUM(thanhtien_metkhoi) OVER(PARTITION BY congdoan)
INTO #THONGKE_SOLUONG
FROM (
	SELECT A.ngaythang,
		A.congdoan, 
		A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu, 
		met = SUM(A.met), 
		metvuong = SUM(A.metvuong), 
		metkhoi = SUM(A.metkhoi),
		dongia_met = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_met), 
		dongia_metvuong = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_metvuong), 
		dongia_metkhoi = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_metkhoi),
		thanhtien_met = SUM(A.met * B.dongia_met), 
		thanhtien_metvuong = SUM(A.metvuong * B.dongia_metvuong),
		thanhtien_metkhoi = SUM(A.metkhoi * B.dongia_metkhoi)
	FROM (
		SELECT A.ngaythang, B.c_op,
			congdoan = CASE 
					WHEN B.c_op = 'DH06' THEN 'DINHHINH1' 
					WHEN B.c_op = 'DH07' THEN 'DINHHINH2' 
					WHEN B.c_op = 'DP09' THEN 'PHOI' 
					WHEN B.c_op = 'DP07' THEN 'VAN' 
				END,
			A.nguyenlieu, C.id AS id_nguyenlieu, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, A.soluong,
			met = (A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000,
			metvuong = (A.rong * A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000000,
			metkhoi = (A.dayy * A.rong * A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000000000
		FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat A
			INNER JOIN #CONGDOAN_SANXUAT B ON A.congdoan = B.c_location
			LEFT JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva C ON A.nguyenlieu = C.nguyenlieu
		WHERE A.ngaythang BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
	) A LEFT JOIN tr_dinhbien_nguyenlieu B ON A.id_nguyenlieu = B.id_nguyenlieu AND A.c_op = B.bophan
	GROUP BY A.ngaythang, A.congdoan, A.id_nguyenlieu, A.nguyenlieu
) A

SELECT A.*, 
	ISNULL(B.tenbophan, A.congdoan) AS tenbophan, 
	B.tongtien
FROM #THONGKE_SOLUONG A
	LEFT JOIN #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN B ON A.congdoan = B.bophan AND A.ngaythang = B.ngaythang

DROP TABLE #THONGKE_SOLUONG, #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN, #CONGDOAN_SANXUAT;

/* update 2024.10.23 by Cường 
SELECT * 
INTO #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN
FROM tr_baocao_hiendien3
WHERE ngaythang BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay;

SELECT A.ngaythang, A.congdoan, A.nguyenlieu,
	dongia_met, dongia_metvuong, dongia_metkhoi,
	met, metvuong, metkhoi,
	thanhtien_met, thanhtien_metvuong, thanhtien_metkhoi,
	dept_thanhtien_met = SUM(thanhtien_met) OVER(PARTITION BY congdoan),
	dept_thanhtien_metvuong = SUM(thanhtien_metvuong) OVER(PARTITION BY congdoan),
	dept_thanhtien_metkhoi = SUM(thanhtien_metkhoi) OVER(PARTITION BY congdoan)
INTO #THONGKE_SOLUONG
FROM (
	SELECT A.ngaythang,
		A.congdoan, A.nguyenlieu, 
		met = SUM(A.met), 
		metvuong = SUM(A.metvuong), 
		metkhoi = SUM(A.metkhoi),
		dongia_met = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_met), 
		dongia_metvuong = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_metvuong), 
		dongia_metkhoi = SUM(DISTINCT B.dongia_metkhoi),
		thanhtien_met = SUM(A.met * B.dongia_met), 
		thanhtien_metvuong = SUM(A.metvuong * B.dongia_metvuong),
		thanhtien_metkhoi = SUM(A.metkhoi * B.dongia_metkhoi)
	FROM (
		SELECT A.ngaythang,
			congdoan = CASE 
					WHEN A.congdoan = 'DH06-PROD' THEN 'DINHHINH' 
					WHEN A.congdoan = 'DH07-PROD' THEN 'DINHHINH' 
					WHEN A.congdoan = 'DP09-PROD' THEN 'PHOI' 
					WHEN A.congdoan = 'DP07-PROD' THEN 'VAN' 
				END,
			A.nguyenlieu, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, A.soluong,
			met = (A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000,
			metvuong = (A.rong * A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000000,
			metkhoi = (A.dayy * A.rong * A.dai * A.soluong) / 1000000000
		FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat A
		WHERE congdoan IN ('DH06-PROD', 'DH07-PROD', 'DP09-PROD', 'DP07-PROD')
			AND A.ngaythang BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay
	) A LEFT JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva B ON A.nguyenlieu = B.nguyenlieu
	GROUP BY A.ngaythang, A.congdoan, A.nguyenlieu
) A

SELECT A.*, 
	ISNULL(B.tenbophan, A.congdoan) AS tenbophan, 
	B.tongtien
FROM #THONGKE_SOLUONG A
	LEFT JOIN #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN B ON A.congdoan = B.bophan AND A.ngaythang = B.ngaythang

DROP TABLE #THONGKE_SOLUONG, #BAOCAO_HIENDIEN;
*/
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_baocao_hiendien3","dbo.tr_dinhbien_nguyenlieu","dbo.tr_khuvuc_sanxuat","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat","dbo.trtb_m_location","dbo.trtb_m_op"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
